pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target properties are not updated to match the runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade asciidoctor-maven-plugin to a version compatible with the new build environment.
Upgrade asciidoctorj-pdf to a version compatible with the new build environment.
Add maven-compiler-plugin version property to manage compiler tooling explicitly.
Add MapStruct version property to manage the new mapping library.
Add Lombok-MapStruct binding version property to resolve annotation processor conflicts.
Add JJWT version property to manage JWT library dependencies.
Add JaCoCo plugin version property for code coverage reporting.
Add Sonar Maven plugin version property for static analysis.
Add documentation directory properties to configure Asciidoctor output paths.
Add Spring Security starter dependency to enable security features.
Add PostgreSQL driver dependency to support PostgreSQL databases.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing secured endpoints.
Replace ModelMapper with MapStruct for type-safe object mapping.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization in JWTs.
Configure Asciidoctor plugin with source and output directories for documentation generation.
Configure Maven compiler plugin with Java 21 source/target and annotation processors for MapStruct and Lombok.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit annotation processor paths, MapStruct and Lombok may conflict or fail to generate code correctly during compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JaCoCo plugin configuration to enable code coverage reporting.
Add Sonar Maven plugin to pluginManagement for static code analysis.

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/config/B.general_idea: Remove the ModelMapper dependency and its bean configuration as part of the library removal.
src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/config/B.why_exists: The ModelMapper library has been removed from the project dependencies, causing a compile error if the import and bean definition remain.

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/config/B.general_idea: Add a PasswordEncoder bean using Spring Security's factory method.

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/controll.general_idea: Replace manual SLF4J logger instantiation with Lombok's @Slf4j annotation to reduce boilerplate.
Replace explicit constructor injection with Lombok's @RequiredArgsConstructor annotation for final fields.
Change response body from a raw String to a Map containing a 'message' key for consistent JSON structure.

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/util/Mes.general_idea: Replace manual private constructor with Lombok @NoArgsConstructor annotation to enforce private access.
Add new message constant keys for faculty, department, sport, feature, member, role, and permission validation errors.
Add nested AnnotationSupported class with formatted message keys for validation annotations.

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/util/Pat.general_idea: Replace manual private constructor with Lombok @NoArgsConstructor annotation for utility class.
Add new path constant definitions for various API endpoints.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Enable virtual threads support for Java 21
Externalize database credentials via environment variables
Enable globally quoted identifiers in Hibernate
Add commented-out SQL logging properties for debugging
